subject: Support additional operands for node filters
commit_message:

Signed-off-by: franciscovila <javier.paradela.vila@est.tech>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

For in_range, setting two values works fine, but if using TOSCA function it is only possible to set one, needs to be two 
Similarly for valid_values, when using TOSCA function it is only possible to set one value

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> For in_range, setting two values works fine, but if using TOSCA function it is only possible to set one, needs to be two

Maybe i got the solution for this, if not, we can talk about it

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-2

Constraint values are always output as strings. For example an int property with equal constraint should be output:
        - int_prop:
          - equal: 6
instead of:
        - int_prop:
          - equal: '6'

ToscaExportHandler::buildNodeFilterValue needs to convert the string value into appropriate type, see PropertyConverter::convertConstraints for how this is handled for constraints in other places

Patch Set 12:

(2 comments)

String properties:
	in_range
		value
			- UNBOUNDED appears in second box
			- Cannot save
		combine
			- Cannot have one value and one value expression (though probably ok for now, can do in a different story, but should document limitation in jira)
		tosca function
			- only one value generated in tosca
	length/min/max
		value
			- enter a string - cannot save (correct) but no reason shown
		tosca function
			- for get_property etc, non integer properties are shown, integer are not shown - should only be ints
			- concat shown - concat can only return string values, not valid here
	pattern
		value
			generated as string - not sure if this correct
	concat
		both
			cannot save unless 2 values added, but no message to user
	valid_values
		tosca function
			- move first box below the "Add to list" button so its alligned with the rest
			- expressions not generated correctly, see below
		both
			cannot combine some values some tosca expressions
			
			
			
Float
	in_range
		value
			- first box has up/down arrows - dont think should have for floats
			- second box doesnt - inconsistent
			- on right hand tab - first is shown as float, second as str
			- UNBOUNDED here too	
		tosca function
			- only one value generated in tosca (as above for str)
	valid_values
		tosca function
			- error thrown 	
			
			
list
	Only equals available - valid_values, length/max length/min length missing
	value
		- checkbox shown we no apparent purpose for each entry in list
		- close and re-open node filter and the values are not shown
